title: RealReal (REAL) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
text: RealReal Q1 2026 earnings call transcript shows GMV increased 24% to $606 million with 32% two-year stacked growth. Total revenue rose 19% to $190 million. Trailing 12-month active buyers grew 10% year-over-year. Average Order Value reached $646, up 15%. Adjusted EBITDA of $13.1 million (6.9% margin), up 430 basis points. Gross profit increased 18% to $141 million. Operating expenses leveraged 730 basis points as percentage of revenue. Cash position ended quarter with $139 million in cash and equivalents. Operating cash flow improved $11.7 million year-over-year. Q2 2026 guidance: GMV $590-$600 million (17%-19% growth), revenue $186-$189 million (13%-14% growth), adjusted EBITDA $11-$12 million. Full year 2026: GMV $2.42-$2.47 billion (14%-16% growth), revenue $770-$784 million (11%-13% growth), adjusted EBITDA $59-$67 million (8.1% margin). Strategic priorities emphasize three pillars: unlocking supply through retail expansion and partner networks, customer service obsession via MyCloset features, and operational excellence through Athena automation (targeting 50% item processing by year-end) and automated storage systems.
